task_goal: Edit note_ens3E.md in Markor. Add to the top of the note May the Force be with you.
task_goal_rewrite: The note file note_ens3E.md in Markor has the text 'May the Force be with you' added as the first line of its content.

checkpoints.description: The note being edited or displayed in Markor is identified as note_ens3E.md
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot showing the filename 'note_ens3E.md' clearly visible in Markor's UI (e.g., title bar, note list, or file navigation pane)

checkpoints.description: The text 'May the Force be with you' appears as the first line of content in the note
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot showing the specified text at the very top of the note's content area, preceding any existing text from the original note

success_rule: Success is achieved when both required checkpoints are satisfied: the correct note (note_ens3E.md) is confirmed to be the target, and the specified text is added to its top as intended.
